---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for QiloBack
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

A clear description of the problem or need this feature would address.

## Proposed solution

Describe how you would like it to work — DSL surface, CLI command, generated artefact, or wrapper behaviour.

## Alternatives considered

Have you thought of other ways to solve this? Workarounds you currently use?

## Use case

Who benefits from this and in what scenario? Is it generator-side (changes the generated FastAPI), runtime-side (changes the platform API), or wrapper-side (changes how users install / invoke `qiloback`)?

## Additional context

Any mockups, references, prior art, related issues, or links to similar features in adjacent tools.
